title: Crawlee · Build reliable crawlers. Fast.
content: Crawlee · Build reliable crawlers. Fast. Skip to main content JavaScript Python Blog Build reliable web scrapers. Fast. Crawlee is a web scraping library for JavaScript and Python. It handles blocking, crawling, proxies, and browsers for you. Learn more Star npx crawlee create my-crawler Learn more Star uvx 'crawlee[cli]' create my-crawler JavaScript Python Run on import { PlaywrightCrawler } from 'crawlee' ; // PlaywrightCrawler crawls the web using a headless browser controlled by the Playwright library. const crawler = new PlaywrightCrawler ( { // Use the requestHandler to process each of the crawled pages. async requestHandler ( { request , page , enqueueLinks , pushData , log } ) { const title = await page . title ( ) ; log . info ( ` Title of ${ request . loadedUrl } is ' ${ title } ' ` ) ; // Save results as JSON to `./storage/datasets/default` directory. await pushData ( { title , url : request . loadedUrl } ) ; // Extract links from the current page and add them to the crawling queue. await enqueueLinks ( ) ; } , // Uncomment this option to see the browser window. // headless: false, // Comment this option to scrape the full website. maxRequestsPerCrawl : 20 , } ) ; // Add
